description:
Capillary Technologies is a SaaS provider of omni-channel customer engagement solutions to retailers. It helps retailers provide connected cross-channel commerce experiences and build loyalty to retain and reward their best customers. In this episode of This is My Architecture, Piyush from Capillary talks about their data ingestion platform, which is built to scale up and down to handle wide variations in number of incoming requests and from a number of different channels.
